TAXONOMY

A Sexual Guide to Platform Capitalism

A Screenplay by Jonathas Davi Gesteira

Comedy · 15 min · Rio de Janeiro, Brazil

→ SCROLL OR USE ARROWS →

DELIVERY #1
📦 🛵 💨 🔥

THE DELIVERY

Set in Rio de Janeiro, this comedy follows two delivery drivers who humorously compare their precarious gig economy work to sexual encounters — revealing the invisible violence of platform capitalism through sharp wit and local slang. 🔥

🎬 Comedy⏱️ 15 min🇧🇷 Portuguese
DELIVERY #2
💋 🍑 😘 🔥 💦

THE ROUTE

Two Riders. One Conversation. All the Truth.

Pedro (22) and Marcos (25), two worn-out delivery drivers, wait for orders outside an upscale restaurant in Rio's South Zone. What begins as Pedro's outrageous comparison between making deliveries and sexual encounters unfolds into a raw, funny, and surprisingly profound meditation on modern labor. 💦🍆

DELIVERY #3
📍 👀 📱 🫣 😈

THE CUSTOMERS

Every delivery has a type...

As they riff on customer types — the voyeur at the window 👁️, the stalker who tracks every move 📍, the complainer who devours everything then leaves a bad review ⭐ — they reveal the precarious reality beneath the humor. 😈🔥

DELIVERY #4
🥸 😰 🫠 💀 🍆

THE RIDERS

PEDRO — 22 🍆

Restless, fast-talking, charismatic. His humor masks deep anxiety about the future.

MARCOS — 25 💪

Broad-shouldered, pragmatic. Father to a young son. Two years in the gig economy.

OLIVEIRA — 40 💋

"Twelve hours getting f***ed and not even a kiss at the end." 🔥

DELIVERY #5
🏳️‍🌈 💕 🎬 ✨

CREATOR'S VISION

"Delivery riders are the invisible infrastructure of modern cities. Their humor is resistance. Their stories deserve cinema." 🎥

— Jonathas Davi Gesteira

Urban Realism 🏙️Natural Light ☀️Social Comedy 😂4th Wall Break 🫵

LAST STOP

Final Delivery 🍾

Pedro gets a low-paying, risky order; Marcos lands a champagne dinner to a gated community. Two dots vanishing into Rio's chaotic traffic. 🛵💨
